## Validation

- [ ] `npm run check`
- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run format:check`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run healthcheck`

## Safety

- [ ] No `.env`, tokens, chat IDs, local contacts, runtime state, or exported config archives are included.
- [ ] Bot command/config/docs changes are documented.
- [ ] Windows start/restart behavior remains hidden where background helpers are expected.
